schedule replay logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so failure is not a proxy-to-EA schedule mismatch
tick execution was mixed versus closed-bar logic across folds, better in five and worse in four, for +3.48 total tick-minus-logic net PnL; execution differences did not rescue candidate quality
